mainEntity.name: What results should I expect from voice assistant optimization?

acceptedAnswer.text: The main outcome is better visibility for spoken queries, especially question-based and local searches. For businesses with clear intent signals, voice optimization can also improve lead quality because the content answers users at the moment they are ready to act.
acceptedAnswer.description: Expect better visibility for conversational searches, stronger local discovery, and cleaner lead intent. It is most effective when paired with fast pages and clear calls to action.
